assetSearch.title: Token search
assetSearch.description: Search by asset code, issuer address, or the exact CODE:ISSUER combination.

actions.trustlineNext: Next step: create trustline from search result
actions.swapNext: Select asset and open swap preview

trustlineStatus.label: Trustline status
trustlineStatus.error: Trustline status could not be loaded

swapPreview.title: Swap preview
swapPreview.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount in {{asset}}.
swapPreview.invalidSlippage: Please enter slippage between 0 and 50 percent.
swapPreview.invalidTarget: Please search and select a destination token or enter it exactly as CODE:ISSUER.
swapPreview.sameAsset: Source and destination must not be the same asset.
swapPreview.destinationTrustlineMissing: The destination token trustline is still missing on this account.
swapPreview.destinationTrustlineUnauthorized: The destination trustline is not authorized by the issuer yet.
swapPreview.minimumMissing: The minimum amount could not be calculated.
swapPreview.failed: Swap preview could not be loaded.
swapPreview.quoteWorseThanMinimum: The refreshed route is below the confirmed minimum amount. Please check the price again.

swapConfirm.title: Confirm swap
swapConfirm.routeRefresh: The route is checked again directly before signing. If the refreshed quote is below the confirmed minimum shown here, signing will not continue.

market.title: Orderbook / AMM
market.failed: Market data could not be loaded.

limitOffer.title: Limit orders
limitOffer.description: Place an offer in the Stellar orderbook. It stays open until it is filled, replaced, or deleted. Every open offer increases the minimum reserve.
limitOffer.warning: This order can be partially or fully filled immediately if a matching counter-offer exists. Check price and direction before signing.
limitOffer.cancelWarning: This deletes the open offer by replacing it with amount 0.
limitOffer.noOffers: No open offers found for this token.
limitOffer.loadFailed: Open offers could not be loaded.
limitOffer.invalidPair: This limit order is missing a valid asset pair.
limitOffer.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid selling amount in {{asset}}.
limitOffer.invalidPrice: Please enter a valid price greater than 0.

trustlineConfirm.title: Confirm trustline
trustlineConfirm.warning: A trustline allows this asset to be held in your account. Check the facts, especially issuer, home domain, stellar.toml, authorization, and clawback before signing.

trustlineFlow.title: Prepare trustline
trustlineFlow.limitHelp: The limit is the maximum token balance on this trustline. It is not a buy order and does not reserve tokens.
trustlineFlow.authRequiredHint: This asset uses auth_required. The trustline can be created, but the issuer must authorize it before you can receive or buy the token via swap.
trustlineFlow.combinedWarning: This transaction creates the trustline first and executes the swap afterwards. The route is checked again directly before signing.
trustlineFlow.combinedOnlyXlm: The combined flow is only available for XLM -> token here.
trustlineFlow.authRequiredCombinedBlocked: Combined trustline+swap is disabled for auth_required assets because the issuer must authorize the new trustline first.
trustlineFlow.invalidLimit: Please enter a valid trustline limit greater than 0.
trustlineFlow.limitBelowExpected: The trustline limit is below the expected received amount.
trustlineFlow.alreadyPresent: The trustline already exists now. Please reload and use the normal swap.
trustlineFlow.combinedSuccess: Trustline and swap were executed. Transaction:

facts.title: Token facts
facts.disclaimer: This is not a rating or recommendation. The app only shows found data; the decision stays with the user.
facts.issuerLoadFailed: Issuer account could not be loaded.

toml.noHomeDomain: No home domain on issuer account

risk.title: Checks before signing
risk.issuerLoadFailed: Issuer data could not be loaded.
risk.noHomeDomain: The issuer has no home domain.
risk.tomlNotLoaded: The stellar.toml is not loaded or not reachable.
risk.tomlAssetMissing: This asset is not listed in the issuer's stellar.toml.
risk.issuerUnlocked: The issuer master key is not locked.
risk.clawbackEnabled: Clawback is enabled for this asset.

detail.nextStepHint: Known in Horizon only. Check issuer and trust before signing a trustline or swap.

result.qualityHint: Note: Trustlines together with domain and TOML are more meaningful. The total amount is shown in the details, but it is not an authenticity signal.

columnHelp.numAccounts: Number of trustlines/accounts according to Horizon.
columnHelp.amount: Total amount of this asset reported by Horizon. If Horizon returns authorization buckets, they are summed.

factLabels.domain: Issuer account has a home domain
factLabels.toml: Asset is listed in this issuer's stellar.toml

invalidInput.queryMissing: Please enter an asset code, issuer address, or CODE:ISSUER.
invalidInput.queryInvalid: Please enter a valid asset code, issuer address, or CODE:ISSUER.
invalidInput.codeInvalid: Asset codes may only contain 1 to 12 letters/numbers.
invalidInput.issuerInvalid: Please enter a valid Stellar issuer address.

failed.generic: The asset search has failed. Please try again later.
